title: Roa's Rules
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Roa's Rules''' were a series of honorable maxims and common-sense tenets developed by the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Roa]] when teaching young smugglers the trade. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], among many others, learned these rules at his side.
*Never ignore a call for help.
*Never take from those who are poorer than yourself.
*Never play [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] unless you're prepared to lose.
*Always be prepared to make a quick getaway.
*Never pilot a ship under the influence.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
